title: Federal Funding — Defense Agencies
content:
Defense-related federal sponsors listed by Morgan State ORA on the Funding Sources page:

- Air Force Office of Scientific Research (AFOSR) — https://www.afrl.af.mil/AFOSR/
- Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) — https://www.darpa.mil/
- U.S. Army Research Office Funding Opportunities — https://www.arl.army.mil/business/broad-agency-announcements/
- U.S. Department of Defense — https://www.defense.gov/
- U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) — https://www.va.gov/
- U.S. DOD Small Business Innovation Research / Small Business Technology Transfer (SBIR/STTR) — https://www.defensesbirsttr.mil/
- U.S. Office of Naval Research (ONR) — https://www.nre.navy.mil/

These sponsors support basic and applied research in defense, aerospace, materials science, cyber, autonomy, sensing, and dual-use technologies. PIs should also consult HBCU/MSI-specific DoD programs (see opportunity_category_hbcu_msi).
